filesChanged.description: Pure SynthesisBundle interface + collect(blackboard|null, childResults, rounds) → {rounds, childResults, findings: readAll()|[]}; no LLM/network/provider imports.

writeSynthesis() atomic tmp+rename (mirrors reporter); hoisted bb/roundsRun to outer scope, outer try/finally so bb.close() runs AFTER collect+write; synthesis write gated on bb!=null after reporter.write.
collect seeded-blackboard, collect(null), source no-network-import assertion.
sc-4-4 synthesis written on blackboard run + report unchanged; sc-4-6 synthesis absent on no-blackboard run.

verification.test: 2786 passed, 3 skipped, 6 failed (all pre-known cockpit MCP); fleet 273/273 pass

notes: collect pure (0 provider/SDK imports). bb.close() AFTER synthesis write (outer finally) so readAll() runs on open db. fleet-synthesis.json only on blackboard runs (bb!=null gate); no-blackboard byte-identical (file absent). fleet-report.json shape unchanged + always written. ATTENTION: roundsRun = effectiveManifest.blackboard!.maxRounds (configured cap), NOT actual rounds executed, because executeRounds returns only final-round executions w/o a count and modifying the coordinator is a Sprint-4 non-goal.
